mapper.sql: id, user_id, role_name, organization, start_date, end_date, is_current, responsibilities, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO roles (user_id, role_name, organization, start_date, end_date, is_current, responsibilities) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleName}, #{organization}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{isCurrent}, #{responsibilities})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM roles WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
